backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the PUNJABI BITES app managing menu items, user profiles, and payment QR code storage, with role-based access control restricting admin-only operations like add/update/delete menu items.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four cart-related features (add-to-cart, cart sidebar, checkout modal, cart state management) to their implementing files and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short descriptions for every frontend source file, serving as a human-readable index of each component's purpose and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point importing Tailwind layers and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the PUNJABI BITES SPA, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with two routes (menu display and admin panel), wraps the entire app in CartProvider, and renders a global Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI shown to unauthenticated or non-admin users, offering a login button (with loading state) and a link back to the menu.
frontend/src/components/CartSidebar.tsx: Sliding right-side cart panel with a floating trigger button (item count badge), per-item quantity increment/decrement/remove controls, grand total display, and a Checkout button; consumes useCart context.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying PUNJABI BITES branding, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the Punjabi Bites brand logo, an admin panel link (shown only to confirmed admins), and a login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that composes Header, a flex-growing main content area, and Footer around child components.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemCard.tsx: Card component displaying a single menu item's name, category emoji, price, description, availability badge, and an add-to-cart button that shows current cart quantity.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx: React Hook Form-based form for creating or editing a menu item, with fields for name, description, price, category, and image URL, wired to add/update mutations with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/PaymentQRCodeMan: Admin component for uploading and previewing a payment QR code image; reads the current QR from the backend and allows replacing it via file input with base64 encoding.
frontend/src/components/PaymentQRCodeMod: Dialog modal that displays an optional order summary and the payment QR code image fetched from the backend for customers to scan and pay.
frontend/src/components/PresetImagePicke: Intentionally empty placeholder module not used in Version 2.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state management with add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations, plus derived totals for amount and item count.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an anonymous or authenticated actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality via AuthClient, exposing identity state and status through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching menu items, admin status, and payment QR code, as well as mutations for adding, updating, deleting, and toggling menu items.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm South Asian (Punjabi Bites) color palette as CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing menu items, allowing authenticated admins to add, edit, delete, and toggle availability of items, with access control guarding the panel.
frontend/src/pages/MenuDisplay.tsx: Public-facing menu page that displays menu items grouped by category in a responsive grid, with cart sidebar, payment QR code modal, and an admin link for authenticated admins.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Punjabi Bites frontend, defining custom brand colors (saffron, deepRed, cream, spice), fonts, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 3) for Punjabi Bites, listing four completed cart/checkout features (add-to-cart, cart sidebar, checkout QR modal, CartContext) and one pending feature request to add a full shopping cart and checkout flow.
